# Reflections

> A private, writing-first wellness journal. No streaks, no pressure, no automatic AI.

## What it is
Reflections is a journaling app where users write notes, name their mood, tag patterns, and optionally use AI to receive personalised reflections informed by their complete writing history via the LLM Wiki system.

## Who it's for
People who want a calm place to think in writing — without gamification, public sharing, or AI that runs without being asked.

## Key features
- Private rich-text journal with mood tracking, tags, tasks, and attachments
- LLM Wiki: an AI-maintained personal knowledge base that grows from your writing
- AI Reflections informed by your full writing history (not just one entry)
- Ambient soundscapes, whisper-to-text, focus mode, breathing exercises
- Future Letters: write to your future self
- Available as web app, PWA, and Android APK

## Pricing
- Free: 30 notes/month, all AI features included
- Pro: unlimited notes (pricing TBD)

## Links
